code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL='http://localhost:5032/api/fixtures';export const GetFixtures=async seasonId=>{const url=API_URL+'/season/';try{const response=await axios.get(url+seasonId);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};export const GetFixture=async fixtureId=>{const url=API_URL+'/';try{const response=await axios.get(url+fixtureId);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};
